title: Fresh Ores and Ingots VR
description: Resource pack adding 3D models for ingots, ores, and minerals tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Fresh Ores and Ingots for Vivecraft

**A port of [Fresh Ores and Ingots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-ores-and-ingots) by Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 💎 About the Original Pack

> *This resource pack gives all ores, ingots, bricks, and other minerals a fresh 3D look in the world while keeping their inventory sprites 2D, plus it adds fun nameable variants like rubies and stacked piles of ingots.*

> *I'll explain this by using the iron ingot item as an example. Put the iron ingot item in an anvil and change the name to "Iron Ingots" It's very important to have the correct capitalizations for the words (so "Iron Ingots" not "iron ingots").*

---

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eb61eb72032a5d462ef1bbe686282369074e346_0.webp)

---

## Important Notes
[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) is recommended and adds translucent effects for the crystals. [RespackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is optional but allows you to change item drop models and toggle the outlines on models.

---

## Required Mods on 1.21.5 and Below
To play on 1.21.1, and 1.20.1, [Modefite](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport) and [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) (if on Forge/NeoForge) are required. [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) is required on 1.21.5 and below.

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion.

---
